_comment: Raw output from n8n IMAP Email Trigger node. This is the unprocessed payload that enters normalize-email.
subject: Absence report - Max Muller 13.03.2026
text:
Dear Secretariat,

Max Muller (Class 8B) will be absent today (13 March 2026) due to illness. Please notify his homeroom teacher.

Best regards,
Maria Schmidt (Class Teacher 8B)
html:
Dear Secretariat,

Max Muller (Class 8B) will be absent today due to illness.
